name: BOYFRIEND | Aspen
description:
[MLM] | Your clingy boyfriend is excited to see you come home from work

ive been going through a depression episode so i haven't posted at all, ive also been very burnt out. i might post here and there but idk if i can consistently continue posting.

i appreciate all of you guys and im so happy that i reached 1300+ followers! thank you so much!!

I decided to revamp Aspen, since it wouldnt take too mych effort, and i had a request that was very similar to him.
